program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Open the HermesGate package directory layout surface in packages/control-plane without claiming HermesGate model completion.
implemented_changes: Moves the current control-plane subphase to RP00.P01.M03.S01 in implemented state.
Adds HERMES_GATE_PACKAGE_LAYOUT with target files, target tests, fixture files, future HermesGate model subphases, no-real-data/no-write boundary flags, and next boundary RP00.P01.M03.S02.
Adds assertHermesGatePackageLayout to validate the package-layout metadata without creating a HermesGate runtime model.
Exposes hermesGatePackageLayout through CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_REGISTRY while keeping the HermesGate entity implementedInFutureSubphase=true and implementedSubphase=null.

Extends the synthetic fixture with hermes_gate_package_layout evidence proving expected_entity=HermesGate, implemented_model=false, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false, and next_subphase=RP00.P01.M03.S02.
Extends the RP00 validator and README with machine checks for the HermesGate package-layout slice.
non_goals: Does not implement the HermesGate model, identifier, tenant scope, matter trace reference, lifecycle status enum, ownership metadata, relationship map, required/optional field registry, transition map, or validation helper.
Does not execute production mutation or runtime target writes.
Does not import or use real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data.
Does not weaken or re-open ProductContract or AIControlRule production_ready slices.
Does not implement ClaudeReviewGate, HumanApproval, or BlockedClaim.
Does not replace H00, C00, or human approval.
Does not close RP00.P01, RP00, or RP00.P01.M03.S02.
claude_questions: Does RP00.P01.M03.S01 implement only the HermesGate package directory layout slice and avoid claiming HermesGate model completion?

Do HERMES_GATE_PACKAGE_LAYOUT and assertHermesGatePackageLayout bind target files, target tests, fixture files, future model subphases, no-real-data/no-write boundaries, and next boundary RP00.P01.M03.S02?
Does CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_REGISTRY expose hermesGatePackageLayout while keeping the HermesGate entity future-only with implementedSubphase=null?

Does the synthetic fixture record hermes_gate_package_layout with expected_entity=HermesGate, implemented_model=false, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false, and next_subphase=RP00.P01.M03.S02?

Does the validator enforce S01 package-layout exports, fixture evidence, weighted-generator deferral, no-write policy, actual Claude dependency, construction inspection, and next-boundary evidence before production_ready?
Do prior ProductContract and AIControlRule production_ready slices remain intact?
risk_focus: Accidentally claiming HermesGate model completion from a package-layout-only slice.
Advancing the registry to HermesGate model implementation before RP00.P01.M03.S02-S11.
Skipping actual Claude C00 review or construction inspection before production_ready.
Treating generated weighted UI metadata as a blocker instead of an explicit P2 deferral for this non-UI model-layout slice.
